description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on push to tags, master, and dev branches, and on pull requests to master and dev branches, but only for QuickOSM/ paths. The workflow has multiple jobs: flake8, test-qgis, package-commit, and release. The flake8 job sets up Python 3.10, checks out the repository, installs dependencies, and runs flake8. The test-qgis job runs tests in a Docker environment. The package-commit job packages the commit and uploads artifacts. The release job creates a release on GitHub, packages and deploys the zip, tweets about the release, and dispatches a repository event.
